analysis_conclusion: Gemini, GPT OSS, Mistral, Qwen, and GLM all returned status=ok and schema_valid=true.
The canonical graph produced 0 primary candidate, 7 validation target(s), and 2 monitor-only item(s).
7 validation targets remain for human review.
log_observations: The run used all 8,011 sanitized stream_v3_runtime rows from 2026-06-26T03:31:23Z to 2026-06-26T17:38:45Z.
The local-first Evidence Bundle retained 654 grouped evidence items and 7 deterministic signals.
The provider prompt used 140 selected evidence items covering 7,383 occurrences (92.2% of the sanitized corpus).
Repeated RUN_ONCE/RUN_RESULT, systemd watchdog, token refresh, Pub/Sub idle, and status snapshot patterns were represented by evidence IDs rather than raw log bodies.
analysis_context.model_projection_policy: AI input used a bounded Evidence Bundle projection: top 140 high-signal evidence items; row-level raw logs stayed out of provider prompts.
source_observations: Sanitized source context was attached with source_context_sha256=669dc2f9d33ff9ab9d73f04d8c17f8718386815d0c6e536dde14b627232637d2.
Source context is interpretation context only; runtime support still has to cite Evidence Item IDs from the sanitized corpus.

items.detail: Gemini, GPT OSS, Mistral, Qwen, and GLM were executed through Vertex-backed endpoints.

items.detail: Raw logs and raw source stayed local; only sanitized bundles and context reached the API.
items.label: Source-first boundary

items.detail: 7,383 occurrences were represented by selected evidence IDs and counts.
items.label: Token compression

items.detail: Provider convergence creates review targets, not automatic causal truth.
items.label: Human gate

review_graph_summary.note: Provider convergence is technical support only; causal and impact judgement remains human-gated. Partial overlap is an overlay count for converged targets where at least one schema-valid provider was silent; it is not additive with target verdict counts.
review_graph_summary.score_definition: Convergence score = claimed successful providers / all successful providers. Silent providers count against convergence.

finding.impact: Gemini, GPT OSS, Mistral, Qwen, and GLM all returned schema-valid outputs. 0 primary candidate and 7 validation target(s) remain human-gated; incident baseline is not auto-accepted.
